apps.name: YouTube+
apps.versionDescription: [STABLE ytp-21] YouTube 21.16.2 + YTLite v5.2o (YouPiP, YouQuality, Return YouTube Dislikes, DontEatMyContent). Built 2026-05-20T23:36:44Z.
apps.localizedDescription: Enhanced YouTube iOS client: ad blocking, Picture-in-Picture, Return YouTube Dislikes, quality selection, and more. Built from the dayanch96/YTLite project via Jake's YTLite_v5.2o fork. Rebuilt periodically as decrypted IPAs refresh.

apps.name: yt20
apps.localizedDescription: Comparison build on legacy YouTube 20.x, where YTLite's own shorts hooks and YTUnShorts both bind. Tests whether the shorts shelf is cleanly removed AND whether the old client still loads video. Coexists with yt21 and the stable app (separate bundle ID).

apps.name: yt21
apps.versionDescription: [YT21 ytp-yt21-1] YouTube 21.20.4 + YTLite v5.2o (YouPiP, YouQuality, Return YouTube Dislikes, DontEatMyContent) [current 21.x baseline]. Built 2026-05-28T22:38:19Z.
apps.localizedDescription: Comparison build on current YouTube 21.20.4 with the clean stable feature set. The shorts shelf leaves the known blank gap when hidden; everything else is fully functional. Coexists with yt20 and the stable app (separate bundle ID).
